array.string: mkdir -p /tmp/.docker-ci printf '{"auths":{}}' > /tmp/.docker-ci/config.json DOCKER_CONFIG=/tmp/.docker-ci /opt/homebrew/bin/docker rm -f janus-runner 2>/dev/null || true DOCKER_CONFIG=/tmp/.docker-ci /opt/homebrew/bin/docker run --rm \ --name janus-runner \ -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock \ -v /tmp/.buildx-cache:/tmp/.buildx-cache \ -e DOCKER_CONFIG=/tmp/.docker-ci \ -e RUNNER_ALLOW_RUNASROOT=1 \ -e GITHUB_OWNER_REPO=opsmode/k8s-janus \ -e GITHUB_PAT="__REPLACE_WITH_PAT__" \ -e RUNNER_NAME=janus-runner-local \ -e RUNNER_LABELS=self-hosted,linux,x64 \ opsmode/k8s-janus-runner:latest
